content.problemStatement:
You are given KKK permutations of integers 111 through NNN. For each iii (1≤i≤K1 \le i \le K1≤i≤K), the iii-th permutation is denoted by Ai,1,Ai,2,…,Ai,NA_{i,1}, A_{i,2}, \ldots, A_{i,N}Ai,1​,Ai,2​,…,Ai,N​.

Construct a directed acyclic graph with NNN nodes (numbered 111 through NNN) such that:


Each of the given permutations is a valid topological sort of the graph. Formally, for each valid kkk and each i,ji, ji,j (1≤i<j≤N1 \le i \lt j \le N1≤i<j≤N), there is no edge from the node Ak,jA_{k,j}Ak,j​ to the node Ak,iA_{k,i}Ak,i​.
The outdegree of each node is at most 111.
The number of nodes with indegree 000 is the smallest possible.
If there are multiple solutions, you may find any one.
constraints: 1≤Ai,j≤N1 \le A_{i,j} \le N1≤Ai,j​≤N for each valid i,ji,ji,j
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 2,0002,0002,000
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and KKK.
KKK lines follow. For each iii (1≤i≤K1 \le i \le K1≤i≤K), the iii-th of these lines contains NNN space-separated integers Ai,1,Ai,2,…,Ai,NA_{i,1}, A_{i,2}, \ldots, A_{i,N}Ai,1​,Ai,2​,…,Ai,N​.
content.outputFormat:
For each test case, print two lines.


The first of these lines should contain one integer ― the minimum number of nodes with indegree 000.
The second line should contain NNN space-separated integers v1,v2,…,vNv_1, v_2, \ldots, v_Nv1​,v2​,…,vN​ describing your graph in the following way: for each valid iii, if vi=0v_i = 0vi​=0, there is no outgoing edge from the iii-th node; otherwise, there is an edge from the iii-th node to the viv_ivi​-th node.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1: The graph must consist of just two disconnected nodes, since no edges are allowed. Hence, there are two nodes with indegree 000.
Example case 2: The graph may contain an edge from node 111 to node 222. Then, there is only one node with indegree 000.
